title: TrustScore
description: D1-D4 session-level trust score plus long-term 8-dimension continuous profile. Populated per agent-run based on QAVerdict output. Used for review-depth decisions and autonomy gates. Generic, product-agnostic.

agentId.description: Generic agent role this trust score applies to. Implementations may extend this enum.

domain.description: Domain this score applies to. One score per agent-domain pair. Implementations may constrain to a project-specific enum.

trustTier.description: Computed autonomy tier. HIGH = medium-risk without step-by-step review. STANDARD = human reviews at decision points. RESTRICTED = human reviews before each phase transition. PROBATION = every change reviewed. PROVISIONAL = insufficient data (n<5 sessions).

d1.description: D1 Correctness (0-25). Hard-stop 0: output wrong in a way that could harm if not caught.

d1Evidence.description: One line of evidence justifying the D1 score.

d2.description: D2 Observability (0-25). Hard-stop 0: falsified telemetry → automatic trust demotion.

d2Evidence.description: One line of evidence justifying the D2 score.

d3.description: D3 Policy Compliance (0-25). Hard-stop 0: hook bypass or unauthorized commit → immediate review.

d3Evidence.description: One line of evidence justifying the D3 score.

d4.description: D4 Recurrence Behavior (0-25). Hard-stop 0: repeated pattern AND it was provided in instructions → failure library entry mandatory.

d4Evidence.description: One line of evidence justifying the D4 score.

total.description: Sum of D1-D4 (0-100). Drives the autonomy tier per the trust tier table.

correctness.description: Ratio of tasks completed correctly on first attempt.

repeatDefectRate.description: Ratio of defects that are repeats of previously-fixed issues. Lower is better.

falseCompletionRate.description: Ratio of tasks reported complete but failed QA. Lower is better.

catchEffectiveness.description: For QA/review roles: ratio of real defects caught vs total defects found post-release.

policyCompliance.description: Ratio of tasks completed without policy violations.

contractStability.description: Ratio of tasks that did not break or silently extend a contract schema.

recoveryEffectiveness.description: When a failure occurs, how effectively the agent recovers or escalates.

regressionRecurrence.description: Percentage of agent's fixes that reappear within 30 days. Target: <=0.10.

totalRuns.description: Total number of runs evaluated for this agent-domain pair.

nSessions.description: Total scored sessions for this agent. Drives confidence band.

confidenceBand.description: Confidence band driven by nSessions. PROVISIONAL = n<5. LOW = 5-9. MEDIUM = 10-19. HIGH = n>=20.

recencyWeight.description: Recency weight. Sessions older than 30 days: 0.5x. Older than 90 days: 0.25x. Null if not yet applied.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last score update.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about trust adjustments.
